ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the recorded data */,
  "prcp" REAL /* Precipitation amount in mm */,
  "snwd" REAL /* Snow depth in cm */,
  "snow" REAL /* Snowfall amount in cm */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "awnd" REAL /* Average wind speed in km/h */,
  "wdf2" REAL /* Wind direction at 2 meters in degrees */,
  "wdf5" REAL /* Wind direction at 5 meters in degrees */,
  "wsf2" REAL /* Wind speed at 2 meters in km/h */,
  "wsf5" REAL /* Wind speed at 5 meters in km/h */,
  "fmtm" INTEGER /* Format time of the data record */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "wt14" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 14 */,
  "wt01" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 01 */,
  "wt17" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 17 */,
  "wt05" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 05 */,
  "wt02" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 02 */,
  "wt22" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 22 */,
  "wt04" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 04 */,
  "wt13" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 13 */,
  "wt16" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 16 */,
  "wt08" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 08 */,
  "wt18" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 18 */,
  "wt03" INTEGER /* Weather type code for day 03 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "date", "time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_quality_flag FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_flag")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather type code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data quality flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_flag")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the weather station
Wind direction at 2 meters in degrees
Wind direction at 5 meters in degrees
Wind speed at 2 meters in km/h
Wind speed at 5 meters in km/h
Format time of the data record
Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius
Unique identifier for the weather station
Elevation of the weather station in meters
Date when the station was established
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
Unique identifier for the weather type code
Description of the weather type code
Unique identifier for the data quality flag
Description of the data quality flag
